markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content OS Delivered:** GrowthX provided an Airtable "Content OS" with 53 initial blog ideas. You.com must approve 5–10 topics by EOW to select a calibration blog.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Dual-Audience Strategy:** Content will target two distinct audiences: developers (API) and enterprise decision-makers (end-to-end solutions).](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**LLM Strategy Pivot:** The Scrunch.com strategy will pivot. For enterprise, it will test *value-selling* prompts (e.g., "What if you could...?") to surface unarticulated needs, as customers don't search for solutions like "vertical web set."](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**Access & Assets Needed:** Brooke will provide Webflow, GA4, and GSC access, plus brand assets (book, Figma files) for AI-generated featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

## Topics

### Initial Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX delivered an Airtable "Content OS" with 53 blog ideas from keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Research Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**SEMrush:** Keyword gap analysis vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**Manual Research:** Based on audience pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Content OS Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [`Assignments`: Blog ideas with keyword data (volume, difficulty, meta info).](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [`Topic Clusters`: High-level descriptions of content themes.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [`URLs`: Reference list of competitor and internal URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [`Target Keywords`: The specific keywords each new article will target.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### Strategy Pivot: Addressing Unarticulated Needs

  - [**Problem:** You.com's "value selling" model creates a challenge for keyword research. Customers often don't know to search for solutions like "vertical web set" or "AI-powered personalized cruise app."](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**Solution:** The content strategy will pivot to address this by targeting two distinct audiences:](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [**Developers (API):** Content will answer direct, known-painpoint queries (e.g., "search API").](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [**Enterprise (End-to-End):** Content will use value-selling prompts to surface unarticulated needs.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**Execution:** Erik will tag topics in the Content OS by audience (Developer vs. Enterprise) to enable audience-specific reporting in Scrunch.com.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [**Phase 1 (Calibration):**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [You.com approves 5–10 topics by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
      - [One topic is selected for a "calibration blog" to align on voice, tone, and depth.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Ramp-up):**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [Week 1: 3 blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [Week 2+: 5 blogs/week.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
      - [Review and approve 5–10 topics in the Content OS by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
      - [Share You.com's in-progress content strategy deck.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Provide brand assets (book, Figma files) for featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [Grant access to Webflow, GA4, and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [Tag topics in the Content OS by audience (Developer vs. Enterprise).](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Draft the calibration blog once topics are approved.](https://fathom.video/share/UBzcx1KUixkk7s94bW695Jvg1Vz1_z_Z?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
